parents.subject: LU-4198 clio: turn on parallel mode for some kind of IO

commit.subject: LU-4198 clio: AIO support for direct IO
commit.message:
LU-4198 clio: AIO support for direct IO

That is it.

TODO list:
1. Small IO merge at the OSC layer
2. write a bunch of test cases for AIO
3. AIO cancel support

Signed-off-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
Change-Id: If4fe0204a1d19fb168a5ac625df38da92c5120f2
